title: DoorDash (DASH) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: The analyst consensus on DoorDash remains strongly bullish with 32-34 analysts covering the stock. Consensus ratings include 26 buy ratings, 15 strong buy ratings, and 12 hold ratings, with no sell recommendations. The consensus price target averages $257.75 to $261.59, implying 59-68% upside potential from recent prices around $153.96. Individual targets range from a low of $185 (Stifel, April 2026) to a high of $350, with an updated target of $250.73 implying 59% potential upside. Despite some recent downward price target revisions, analyst research reflects a split tape with several upward price target revisions and upgrades to more positive ratings offsetting downgrades. The consistent 'Buy' consensus underscores analyst confidence in DoorDash's growth trajectory and strategic positioning.
